summary: Designed and implemented 1-click bootstrap scripts. Created 'bin/agent-protocol-init' Node script to initialize the MCP server, inject IDE rules, and generate a clean state without polluting the framework repository's history. Updated 'install.sh' and 'setup.sh' to point to this new entry. Updated adapter templates to point to the new 'documentation/AI_GUIDES/SYSTEM_PROMPT.md' path.
